rationale: Educ. Code §37.2071 governs school district multihazard emergency operations plan review. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The center shall establish a random or need-based cycle for the center's review and verification of school district and public junior college district multihazard emergency operations plans adopted under Section 37.108.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
